name: nizam-skill-index-negative-fixture
description: Negative fixture for validator check C13 (skill-index integrity, feature 049 / NDEBT-007): the retired-capability entry's module pointer dangles (methodology/99_retired.md does not exist), reproducing the exact v0.4.0-v0.5.3 release_train defect class. Exercised end-to-end by substituting this file for tools/skill.json in a scratch clone and asserting the full sweep reports [C13] FAIL naming the dangling path; wired into the standing self-test surface by feature 052 (NDEBT-009). The filename deliberately avoids the C12 family prefixes (ecosystem_baseline/preflight_verdict/engineering_finding) so C12 ignores it.
